description: JavaScript code embedded in PDF — executes on open
detail: Attackers embed JS to exploit PDF readers or download malware

description: JavaScript shorthand tag in PDF
detail: Shorthand for /JavaScript — same risk level

description: PDF Launch action — can execute any file on system
detail: Can run cmd.exe, PowerShell or any executable silently

description: PDF auto-execute action — triggers when document opens
detail: Combined with /Launch or /JS creates drive-by execution

description: PDF additional actions — triggers on various user actions
detail: Can trigger on page open, close, keystroke etc.

description: File embedded inside PDF — hidden payload
detail: Malware can be hidden inside PDFs as embedded files

description: Rich media embedding — can contain Flash/video exploits
detail: Historical attack vector via Flash vulnerabilities

description: XFA form — XML-based forms that can contain scripts
detail: XFA forms can execute JavaScript and make network requests

description: JavaScript eval() in PDF — executes dynamic code
detail: Used to obfuscate malicious JavaScript payloads

description: String unescaping in PDF JavaScript
detail: Common obfuscation technique in malicious PDFs

description: External URI reference in PDF
detail: PDF links to external resource — may be phishing

description: Form submission action — can exfiltrate data
detail: PDF can silently submit form data to attacker server

description: PDF interactive form detected
detail: Forms can be used to harvest user input or trigger actions

description: PDF is encrypted — contents hidden from scanners
detail: Encrypted PDFs are used to hide malicious content from AV tools

description: Object stream detected — objects compressed inside stream
detail: Used to hide dangerous objects from basic pattern scanners

description: ASCII hex encoding in stream
detail: Encoding filter sometimes used to obfuscate stream content

description: ASCII85 encoding in stream
detail: Encoding filter sometimes used to obfuscate stream content

description: JBIG2 image compression — historic exploit vector
detail: CVE-2009-0658: JBIG2 decoder exploit used in targeted attacks

description: Remote Go-To action — opens external PDF
detail: Can redirect user to a malicious external document

description: Sound action embedded in PDF
detail: Unusual in normal documents — may be used for social engineering

description: Movie action embedded in PDF
detail: Can be used to trigger media player exploits

description: JavaScript alert dialog in PDF
detail: Used in social engineering attacks to trick users

description: JavaScript app.exec() — executes system commands
detail: Dangerous JS API that can run arbitrary commands on the host

description: JavaScript exportDataObject() — extracts embedded files
detail: Used to silently drop and execute embedded malware payloads

description: JavaScript util.printf() — historic buffer overflow vector
detail: CVE-2008-2992: used in early PDF exploits for code execution

description: File specification or font reference
detail: Could reference an external file — context-dependent
